published.text:
Badge: CRM Workflows

Headline:
CRM Automation Examples for Small Business

Hero intro:
Your CRM should not be a glorified contact list. With the right automation, it becomes the engine that runs your lead follow-up, client communication, and operations. This page shows you real CRM automation workflows that small service businesses use every day — not theoretical possibilities, but systems that are running in production right now.

Hero subtext:
Below: practical CRM automation examples organized by use case, with honest guidance on complexity and what you need to get started.

Section titles:
- Lead management automations
- Client communication automations
- CRM automation complexity and tools (table)
- CRM automation mistakes to avoid
- Real CRM automation results (case studies)

CTA heading: Ready to make your CRM work for you?

edits.description: Two card sections split by function: lead management vs. client communication
Table compares built-in CRM vs. CRM+Zapier vs. CRM+n8n across capabilities
Mistakes section is practical: clean data first, do not over-automate communication
Case studies tie to existing pages (ecommerce CRM, Instagram lead gen)
"Not theoretical possibilities, but systems that are running in production right now"
Interlinks: n8n examples, GoHighLevel vs custom CRM, email sequence, lead follow-up examples

closer.text: CTA heading: Ready to make your CRM work for you?
